name: Allied Credit Group Inc
description_short: Atlanta-based credit repair and business credit building firm offering credit score improvement, dispute services, and business credit establishment programs.
description_long:
Allied Credit Group Inc is a financial services company located in the Lenox Road corridor of Atlanta, Georgia, specializing in credit repair and credit counseling. The firm operates as a fix-my-credit service provider with a focus on both personal credit restoration and business credit development.

The company offers credit repair services designed to dispute errors and negative items on credit reports, along with credit counseling to help consumers understand credit mechanics. Beyond personal credit work, they provide specialized programs for building and establishing business credit without leveraging personal credit profiles—a service that distinguishes them from traditional credit repair shops. Their service model appears consultative, with staff members (like a representative named Ty mentioned in reviews) conducting scheduled sessions with clients.

Alied Credit Group Inc differentiates itself through results-oriented marketing and business credit expertise. Customer reviews highlight rapid credit score improvements (one reviewer reported over 100 points in less than 60 days) and professional service delivery. The company emphasizes that clients receive exactly what was outlined during consultations, suggesting a transparent, agreement-based approach. The business credit programs are noted as particularly valuable for entrepreneurs seeking to build corporate credit independent of personal financial history.

The company maintains limited hours (11 AM–3 PM weekdays and Sundays, closed Saturdays) and operates from a professional office address in the Lenox Financial Center, lending credibility. However, the limited operational hours may inconvenience working professionals, and like all credit repair firms, results depend on dispute outcomes that the company cannot guarantee. The strong review ratings (5.0 stars across available reviews) suggest customer satisfaction, though the sample size is small and reviews are self-reported.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Specializes in business credit building without using personal credit—a niche service distinct from typical credit repair
Reported rapid results: one customer achieved 100+ point credit score improvement in under 60 days
Professional staff noted for expertise and informative consultations (reviewer mentioned staff member Ty specifically)
Transparent service delivery: customers report receiving exactly what was outlined in initial consultations
Dedicated credit counseling services alongside credit repair, offering education-focused approach
All available customer reviews rate the company at 5.0 stars, indicating high customer satisfaction
Located in professional office space (Lenox Financial Center), suggesting established, legitimate operation
cons: Very limited operating hours (11 AM–3 PM only) may be inconvenient for working professionals unable to schedule during those windows
Small sample of public reviews (only 6 visible) limits ability to assess consistency and reliability across larger customer base
No information provided about pricing, fee structures, or service costs—critical factor for evaluating value
Like all credit repair firms, cannot guarantee dispute outcomes; results depend on creditor and credit bureau responses
Closed Saturdays and only open Sunday 11 AM–3 PM, limiting weekend accessibility
best_for: Entrepreneurs and small business owners seeking to establish separate business credit independent of personal credit history
Consumers with damaged personal credit seeking rapid dispute-based repair with professional guidance
Individuals preferring in-person, consultative service over online-only credit repair platforms
diagnosis: Allied Credit Group Inc is best suited for Atlanta-area consumers and entrepreneurs seeking professional, in-person credit repair combined with business credit expertise—particularly those looking to build corporate credit independently. The main caveat is their severely restricted operating hours (11 AM–3 PM weekdays/Sundays only) and lack of published pricing information, which may make scheduling difficult and cost comparison impossible before initial consultation.
services: Business credit programs that do not require personal credit leverage
Credit report error identification and disputes
Credit profile analysis and strategy development
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3550 Lenox Rd NE f21, Atlanta, GA 30326
